Interface AdoptionService

All Known Implementing Classes:
AdoptionServiceImpl
public interface AdoptionService
Manages the full lifecycle of adoption requests, from initial submission through approval or rejection. Implementations are responsible for validating requests and updating request state accordingly.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    approve(AdoptionRequest request)
    Approves a pending adoption request and marks the animal as adopted.
    void
    cancel(AdoptionRequest request)
    Cancels a pending adoption request at the adopter's request.
    List<AdoptionRequest>
    getApprovedAfter(LocalDate date)
    Returns all approved adoption requests where approval occurred after the given date.
    List<AdoptionRequest>
    getRequestsAfter(LocalDate date)
    Returns all adoption requests submitted after the given date.
    List<AdoptionRequest>
    getRequestsByAdopter(Adopter adopter)
    Returns all adoption requests submitted by the given adopter.
    List<AdoptionRequest>
    getRequestsByAnimal(Animal animal)
    Returns all adoption requests for the given animal across all adopters.
    List<AdoptionRequest>
    getRequestsByShelter(Shelter shelter)
    Returns all adoption requests associated with animals in the given shelter.
    List<AdoptionRequest>
    listAll()
    Returns every adoption request currently persisted in the system.
    void
    reject(AdoptionRequest request)
    Rejects a pending adoption request with no further action on the animal.
    void
    submit(AdoptionRequest request)
    Submits a new adoption request into the system for review.

  • Method Details

    • submit

      void submit(AdoptionRequest request)
      Submits a new adoption request into the system for review. Throws an exception if the request is invalid or the animal is unavailable.
      Parameters:
      request - the adoption request to submit

    • approve

      void approve(AdoptionRequest request)
      Approves a pending adoption request and marks the animal as adopted. Throws an exception if the request is not in a pending state.
      Parameters:
      request - the adoption request to approve

    • reject

      void reject(AdoptionRequest request)
      Rejects a pending adoption request with no further action on the animal. Throws an exception if the request is not in a pending state.
      Parameters:
      request - the adoption request to reject

    • cancel

      void cancel(AdoptionRequest request)
      Cancels a pending adoption request at the adopter's request. Throws an exception if the request is not in a pending state.
      Parameters:
      request - the adoption request to cancel

    • getRequestsByAdopter

      List<AdoptionRequest> getRequestsByAdopter(Adopter adopter)
      Returns all adoption requests submitted by the given adopter. Returns an empty list if the adopter has no requests on record.
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter whose requests to retrieve
      Returns:
      a list of adoption requests belonging to the adopter

    • getRequestsByShelter

      List<AdoptionRequest> getRequestsByShelter(Shelter shelter)
      Returns all adoption requests associated with animals in the given shelter. Returns an empty list if the shelter has no adoption requests.
      Parameters:
      shelter - the shelter to query
      Returns:
      a list of adoption requests for animals in the shelter

    • getRequestsByAnimal

      List<AdoptionRequest> getRequestsByAnimal(Animal animal)
      Returns all adoption requests for the given animal across all adopters. Returns an empty list if no requests exist for the animal.
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal to query
      Returns:
      a list of adoption requests targeting the animal

    • getRequestsAfter

      List<AdoptionRequest> getRequestsAfter(LocalDate date)
      Returns all adoption requests submitted after the given date. Returns an empty list if no requests exist after that date.
      Parameters:
      date - the cutoff date (exclusive)
      Returns:
      a list of adoption requests submitted after the date

    • getApprovedAfter

      List<AdoptionRequest> getApprovedAfter(LocalDate date)
      Returns all approved adoption requests where approval occurred after the given date. Returns an empty list if no approvals exist after that date.
      Parameters:
      date - the cutoff date (exclusive)
      Returns:
      a list of approved adoption requests after the date

    • listAll

      List<AdoptionRequest> listAll()
      Returns every adoption request currently persisted in the system. Returns an empty list if no requests have been submitted. Used by the presentation layer to render a full snapshot of the adoption queue.
      Returns:
      a list of all adoption requests
